description: Machine-checkable, enforceable DAX rules for the BI analyzer. Each rule: detect heuristic, fix, rationale, doc refs, plus operational fields (detectability, required_inputs, related_concepts) and promoted_from provenance for rules graduated from analyzer-rule-candidates.json. Severities: error|warning|info.

rules.title: Time-intelligence table function used outside CALCULATE filter / VAR
rules.detect: DATESYTD|DATESQTD|DATESMTD|SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR|DATEADD|DATESBETWEEN|ENDOFMONTH|PARALLELPERIOD appearing as a scalar expression or inside an iterator (SUMX/FILTER/ADDCOLUMNS) row context rather than as a CALCULATE/CALCULATETABLE filter argument or assigned to a VAR used as a filter.
rules.fix: Move the TI function into a CALCULATE filter argument or a VAR; use scalar date funcs (EDATE/EOMONTH/date math) for row-level needs.
rules.rationale: TI table funcs depend on filter context; misused they error, mislead, or trigger costly implicit context transitions.

rules.title: Date table not marked / calendar not contiguous
rules.detect: Model uses TI functions but the Date table is not Marked as Date Table, or the calendar has gaps / does not span Jan 1..Dec 31 of all referenced years.
rules.fix: Mark as Date Table (or add REMOVEFILTERS('Date') to each TI CALCULATE); build a contiguous calendar.
rules.rationale: Unmarked/incomplete date tables silently break time intelligence.

rules.title: Auto Date/Time enabled
rules.detect: Power BI Auto Date/Time is on, or column-variation syntax ('Date'.[Month]) is used.
rules.fix: Disable Auto Date/Time; use one explicit Date table.
rules.rationale: Bloats model, fragments time intelligence.

rules.title: Division with '/' instead of DIVIDE
rules.detect: A '/' operator between two measure/aggregation expressions without DIVIDE.
rules.fix: Use DIVIDE(numerator, denominator [, alternate]).
rules.rationale: Guards divide-by-zero, engine-optimized.

rules.title: Computed filter set without KEEPFILTERS
rules.detect: CALCULATE applies a FILTER/VALUES/TOPN-derived table over a column that the user also slices, without KEEPFILTERS, where intersection (not replacement) is intended.
rules.fix: Wrap the computed set in KEEPFILTERS when it must respect the existing selection.
rules.rationale: Default CALCULATE filters replace; users expect their slicers to still apply.

rules.title: Non-additive measure shown additively / total mismatch
rules.detect: Distinct counts, segmentation, ranking, or running totals where the grand total is left to the engine to sum the visible rows.
rules.fix: Aggregate at the correct grain (iterate years/segments and sum) or document the intended non-additive total.
rules.rationale: The total of a non-additive measure is not the sum of rows.

rules.title: Measure iterated over fact-grain table
rules.detect: SUMX/AVERAGEX/etc. iterating the fact table while calling a measure (forcing per-row context transition).
rules.fix: Iterate the relevant dimension, or use column arithmetic / a single CALCULATE.
rules.rationale: Millions of context transitions are a classic slowdown.

rules.title: FILTER over whole table where a column predicate suffices
rules.detect: CALCULATE([m], FILTER('Table', 'Table'[Col] = <constant>)) with a single-column constant condition.
rules.fix: Use a column predicate: CALCULATE([m], 'Table'[Col] = <constant>); if FILTER is required, filter VALUES(col) or the smallest table.
rules.rationale: Column predicate is a storage-engine filter; FILTER(table) materializes more.

rules.title: Repeated expensive subexpression not captured in VAR
rules.detect: Same measure/expression referenced 2+ times within one definition without a VAR.
rules.fix: Assign to a VAR once and reuse.
rules.rationale: Avoids recomputation; improves readability.

rules.title: High-cardinality calculated column
rules.detect: Calculated column with near-unique values (concatenated keys, full-precision datetime).
rules.fix: Split datetime, reduce precision, push to ETL, or compute as a measure.
rules.rationale: Destroys VertiPaq compression, bloats model.

rules.title: Over-broad ALL clearing more than intended
rules.detect: ALL('Table') or ALL('Date') used where only specific column(s) should be cleared.
rules.fix: Clear specific columns with REMOVEFILTERS('Table'[Col]) or keep survivors with ALLEXCEPT.
rules.rationale: Clearing too much changes results unexpectedly.

rules.title: Bi-directional relationship used as a default
rules.detect: Bi-directional cross-filter enabled on relationships without a specific documented need.
rules.fix: Keep single-direction; apply CROSSFILTER per-measure or use TREATAS for virtual relationships.
rules.rationale: Ambiguous paths, surprising totals, perf cliffs.

rules.title: SELECTEDVALUE without default on a parameter
rules.detect: SELECTEDVALUE('Param'[Col]) reading a disconnected parameter without a default argument.
rules.fix: Provide a default for the no-selection / multi-selection case.
rules.rationale: Avoids blank/unexpected behavior when nothing or many are selected.

rules.title: Reference convention violated
rules.detect: Unqualified column reference ([Col]) or qualified measure reference ('Table'[Measure]).
rules.fix: Qualify columns ('Table'[Col]); leave measures unqualified ([Measure]).
rules.rationale: Disambiguates columns vs measures; prevents name-collision bugs.

rules.title: Unformatted / monolithic formula
rules.detect: Long single-line measure, no VARs, no DAX-Formatter-style layout, no intent comments.
rules.fix: Format (one filter arg per line), decompose with named VARs, comment intent.
rules.rationale: Reviewable, diffable, teachable.

rules.title: Implicit measure (auto-aggregated column in a visual)
rules.detect: A raw fact column dragged into the values area instead of an explicit measure.
rules.fix: Define an explicit, named measure.
rules.rationale: Hidden, inconsistent logic scattered across visuals.

rules.title: Segmentation config table with overlapping/gapped ranges
rules.detect: Config table where Min/Max ranges overlap or leave gaps so a value matches 0 or 2+ segments.
rules.fix: Make ranges contiguous and non-overlapping (e.g. derive Max from next row's Min).
rules.rationale: Causes errors or double-counting in segmentation patterns.

rules.title: Role-playing date not activated with USERELATIONSHIP
rules.detect: A measure analyzes by a non-active date/role column (e.g. 'Sales'[DeliveryDate]) while an inactive relationship to 'Date' exists, with no USERELATIONSHIP in scope.
rules.fix: Wrap the measure in CALCULATE(..., USERELATIONSHIP(factDateColumn, 'Date'[Date])).
rules.rationale: Plain measures use only the active relationship; the inactive role silently does not filter.

rules.title: Expression computed inside SUMMARIZE instead of ADDCOLUMNS
rules.detect: Aggregations/measures supplied as added columns directly inside SUMMARIZE(...).
rules.fix: Use SUMMARIZE only to group; compute expressions with ADDCOLUMNS over the grouping, or use SUMMARIZECOLUMNS.
rules.rationale: Computing expressions inside SUMMARIZE sets context in a way that yields subtle wrong results.

rules.title: IF(HASONEVALUE, VALUES) idiom replaceable by SELECTEDVALUE
rules.detect: IF(HASONEVALUE(col), VALUES(col) [, alternate]) pattern.
rules.fix: Use SELECTEDVALUE(col, alternate).
rules.rationale: Concise and safe when zero or many values are in context.

promotion_note: 2026-06-26: graduated 10 analyzer_v1 candidates from analyzer-rule-candidates.json. 7 enriched existing rules (see promoted_from); 3 added as new rules (AR-REL-001, AR-FUNC-001, AR-STYLE-004).
